summary: Classified the live PR inventory shard conservatively. No security-sensitive refs were detected. No close, merge, fix, or PR actions are planned because instant close, low-signal close, merge, fix, and raise-pr permissions are disabled, and the open PRs require maintainer or technical correctness judgment.
